source: SSR rendering (explore page via Camoufox browser)
limitation: Pages 2-3 require web_session cookie (login). Without it the homefeed API returns items=0.
next_steps: Option A: Scan QR code to login and get web_session
Option B: Implement offline XYS_ signing (requires VMP bytecode extraction)
Option C: Use existing xhshow Python package for full signing support
